description: Composition Black woven trousers made of a cotton blend fabric, has a flat front with two insert pockets on the sides, two welt pockets on the back with buttoned closures, plastic zipper, hook and button closure on the front, loops on the waist to secure a belt and extended hems that can be trimmed to suit the wearer's height Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash gentle Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only do not iron directly on decorations Upgrade your style with these woven pants from arrow. The cotton blend fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day, while the classic cut of the trousers make it perfect for casual and semi-formal wear. Team It with slim fit shirts and leather slip-ons for a well groomed look. Model statistics The product is of length 44" on a model of height 6'3" waist 32& rdquo
